content:
🌟 cap4d | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Generating animatable 4D portrait avatars from input images.
✨ Key Features: • Creation of animatable 4D portrait avatars • Utilizes morphable multi-view diffusion models • Supports generation from a few reference images • Includes a real-time viewer for exported animations • Provides scripts for quick start, inference, and custom inference
📖 Summary: CAP4D is an official repository for creating animatable 4D portrait avatars from a few reference images using morphable multi-view diffusion models. It enables the generation of dynamic 3D avatars that can be animated and viewed in real-time.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
